cursor_legacy_shim_lines: All canonical instructions live in AGENTS.md - read that first.
Use 127.0.0.1 for host-bound local dev URLs; container service names are allowed inside container networks.
Provider-backed AI/LLM/embedding/vision inference goes through backend/core_ai.py.
Never inline system prompts - use prompt_registry.py.
Never log or expose PII in error messages.
AI-generated health advice must include a medical disclaimer and recommend consulting a qualified clinician.
Database schema changes must update SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, and migration/startup logic together.
Tests must mock all AI calls; never hit real APIs.
copilot_repo_lines: All canonical instructions live in AGENTS.md - read that first.
Use 127.0.0.1 for host-bound local dev URLs; container service names are allowed inside container networks.
Provider-backed AI/LLM/embedding/vision inference goes through backend/core_ai.py.
Never inline system prompts - use prompt_registry.py.
Never log or expose PII in error messages.
AI-generated health advice must include a medical disclaimer and recommend consulting a qualified clinician.
Database schema changes must update SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, and migration/startup logic together.
Backend is FastAPI (Python 3.11+), frontend is Next.js 16 App Router (TypeScript/React 19).
ML model loading is owned by prediction.py.
Database sessions go through backend.database.get_db in routes.

cursor_root_rule.description: AI Healthcare System - Root rules (always apply)
lines: All canonical instructions live in AGENTS.md - read that first.
Use 127.0.0.1 for host-bound local dev URLs; container service names are allowed inside container networks.
Provider-backed AI/LLM/embedding/vision inference goes through backend/core_ai.py.
Never inline system prompts - use prompt_registry.py.
Never log or expose PII in error messages.
AI-generated health advice must include a medical disclaimer and recommend consulting a qualified clinician.
Database schema changes must update SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, and migration/startup logic together.

copilot_lines: Read backend/AGENTS.md for backend-specific rules.
Provider-backed AI calls go through core_ai.py - never import provider SDKs directly outside core_ai.py.
Use backend.database.get_db for DB sessions in routes.
Update models.py, schemas.py, and main.py migration/startup logic together for schema changes.
Prompts are version-controlled in prompt_registry.py.
HIPAA: Health data must be scoped to current_user.id.
scopes.cursor_description: Backend API and AI module rules
cursor_lines: Read backend/AGENTS.md for backend-specific rules.
Provider-backed AI calls go through core_ai.py.
Use backend.database.get_db for DB sessions in routes.
Update models.py, schemas.py, and main.py migration/startup logic together for schema changes.

HIPAA: Health data must be scoped to current_user.id.

copilot_lines: Read frontend/AGENTS.md for frontend-specific rules.
Frontend is Next.js 16 App Router (TypeScript/React 19).
Routes live in frontend/src/app; shared components in frontend/src/components; helpers/hooks in frontend/src/lib.
Use NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL for browser-facing backend URLs and default to http://127.0.0.1:8000.
Include medical disclaimers in prediction, chat, report-analysis, and other patient-facing medical AI views.
Frontend Jest tests live in frontend/src/__tests__; Playwright tests live in frontend/tests.

copilot_lines: Read frontend_legacy/AGENTS.md for legacy Streamlit frontend rules.
This subtree is reference-only unless the user explicitly asks for legacy frontend changes.
Use shared API client utilities from frontend_legacy/utils/.
Default backend URL to http://127.0.0.1:8000 through BACKEND_URL.

copilot_lines: Read tests/AGENTS.md for test-specific rules.
These are backend pytest tests; frontend Jest and Playwright tests live under frontend/.
Mock all AI calls - never hit real APIs in tests.
Use fresh test database per session.
Don't assert exact ML prediction values.
cursor_lines: Read tests/AGENTS.md for test-specific rules.
These are backend pytest tests; frontend Jest and Playwright tests live under frontend/.
Mock all AI calls - never hit real APIs.
Use fresh test database per session.

product: AI Healthcare System - Intelligent medical diagnostic platform.
Provides disease risk prediction (diabetes, heart, liver, kidney, lungs).
AI-powered medical chatbot with RAG-based patient context.
Multi-tier AI inference: Ollama (local) -> Gemini (cloud) -> OpenAI/Anthropic (optional).
Telemedicine appointment booking and health record management.
Enterprise features: role-based access, PDF reports, compliance monitoring.
tech: AI: Multi-tier - Ollama (local), Google Gemini (cloud), OpenAI/Anthropic (optional).
RAG: core_ai-managed embeddings, cosine similarity vector store.
Auth: JWT tokens, bcrypt password hashing.
Deployment: Docker, Render, Hugging Face Spaces.
structure: backend/ - FastAPI app, API routes, AI modules, ML services, database models.
frontend/ - Next.js 16 App Router UI with src/app, src/components, frontend tests, and src/lib.
frontend_legacy/ - legacy Streamlit UI kept for reference only.
scripts/ - DevX utilities (ai_context.py, sync_agent_adapters.py), DB management.
data/ - Training datasets for ML models.
